competitors.name: Mouse Jiggler (Arkane Systems)
competitors.keyDifference: Explicitly detectable by monitoring software; Dedge MouseJiggler adds Bluetooth proximity detection for automatic activation based on physical presence
competitors.notes: Most well-known open-source mouse jiggler (1.3k GitHub stars). System tray, Windows 10/11 64-bit. Available via Winget/Chocolatey

competitors.name: Move Mouse
competitors.keyDifference: More customizable mouse movement but lacks Bluetooth proximity detection; Dedge MouseJiggler activates automatically based on device presence
competitors.notes: Feature-rich mouse mover on Microsoft Store (v4.19.3). Scheduling, click/keyboard sim, blackout scheduling, PowerShell integration, stealth mode

competitors.name: Caffeine
competitors.keyDifference: Simple keypress simulation only; Dedge MouseJiggler provides actual mouse movement plus Bluetooth proximity detection
competitors.notes: Minimalist keep-alive tool. Simulates F15 keypress every 59 seconds. System tray, simple on/off toggle. Very lightweight

competitors.name: PowerToys Awake
competitors.keyDifference: Prevents sleep but doesn't simulate user input (won't bypass Group Policy screen lock); Dedge MouseJiggler simulates mouse input with Bluetooth proximity
competitors.notes: Part of Microsoft PowerToys suite. Keeps PC awake via power plan integration. Timed or indefinite modes. No mouse/keyboard simulation

competitors.name: Don't Sleep
competitors.keyDifference: Prevents system power state changes but doesn't simulate user activity or bypass screen lock; Dedge MouseJiggler simulates genuine mouse input with Bluetooth proximity
competitors.notes: Portable freeware preventing shutdown/standby/hibernate/screensaver. Timer-based rules, blocklist/allowlist. System tray operation
